testedConfigurations: Junos® OS Evolved version 22.4 running on Juniper Networks® Packet Transport Router Model PTX10001-36MR with Intel® Xeon® D-2163IT with PAA Junos® OS Evolved version 22.4 running on Juniper Networks® Packet Transport Router Model PTX10001-36MR with Intel® Xeon® D-2163IT without PAA
certificate.moduleName: Junos® OS Evolved OpenSSL Cryptographic Module
certificate.caveat: Interim Validation. When operated in approved mode with module Junos® OS Evolved Kernel Cryptographic Module version 2.0 validated to FIPS 140-3 under Cert. #4776 operating in the Approved mode. When installed, initialized and configured as specified in section 11 of the Security Policy. The module generates cryptographic keys whose strengths are modified by available entropy
certificate.description: The Junos® OS Evolved OpenSSL Cryptographic Module provides a C language application program interface (API) for use by other applications that require cryptographic functionality.
